Support
Product support included
What's Product Support?
In the event your product doesn't work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, and help videos. By solving product issues, we help the planet by extending the life of products. Availability of support options differ by product and country. Learn more
Payment
Secure transaction
Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more
Gift options
Available at checkout
Available at checkout This item is a gift. Change
At checkout, you can add a custom message, a gift receipt for easy returns and have the item gift-wrapped
Packaging
Ships in product packaging
Ships in product packaging

This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.

If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

About this item

  • PATENTED MULTI-SENSORY CRUSHER BASS TECHNOLOGY. Featuring two full-range 40mm audio drivers plus additional dual bass drivers, your music and movies will come alive with a sound experience you can actually feel
  • ADJUSTABLE 4-MIC ACTIVE NOISE CANCELLING. Designed with adjustable 4-mic active noise canceling that allows you to hush the chaos around you
  • UP TO 60 HOURS BATTERY + RAPID CHARGE. Get hours of uninterrupted listening with up to 60 hours of battery life with ANC off. With Rapid Charge, just 10 minutes of charging gives you 4 hours of listening
  • PERSONALIZED SOUND IN THE SKULL-IQ APP. Customize your sound with Personal Sound by Mimi, adjustable hearing modes: Active Noise Canceling, Stay-Aware, and fine-tune your EQ
  • MULTIPOINT PAIRING. Connect to two devices at once with seamless transitions
  • BUNDLE INCLUDES EXTRA USB-C TO USB-C CHARGING CABLE. The headphones come with an additional 1.6 ft 15-watt high speed charging cable, so that you can power up on the go
  • BUY WITH CONFIDENCE. Skullcandy 1-Year USA Limited Warranty included

From the manufacturer

WELCOME TO YOUR ALL-ACCESS PASS TO IMMERSIVE SOUND. CRUSHER ANC 2 LEVELS UP YOUR LISTENING WITH SENSORY BASS AND CUSTOMIZABLE NOISE CANCELLATION.

FEEL THE BASS. FOR REAL.

Our patented Crusher Bass doesn’t just play sound, it hits. Crank it up and feel every beat in your bones, or dial it back for chill mode. This is sound you don’t just hear. You actually feel it.

NOISE? CANCELLED.

Whether it’s loud crowds or background chaos, adjustable 4-mic active noise canceling puts the power in your hands. Block it out or let some in. You’re in charge.

TUNED TO YOU.

Take the quick hearing test in the Skull-iQ app to create your Personal Sound profile. It fine-tunes audio in real time so you catch every detail. Even the ones you didn’t know you were missing.

WITH THE SKULL-IQ APP, DIAL IN YOUR UNIQUE HEARING PROFILE, TWEAK THE EQ, AND EVEN ASSIGN CUSTOM BUTTON FUNCTIONS. IT’S YOUR SOUND, YOUR WAY.

Crusher ANC 2
Crusher Evo
Crusher 540 Active
Crusher Wireless

From the brand

Previous page

  2. Skullcandy was born in 2003, at the crossroads of music and boardsports culture. Our office was a garage and home was the snow-covered slopes of the Rocky Mountains. Over the past 20 years we’ve gone global, but our core values remain and our connection to boardsports culture is what drives us.

Customer ReviewIs it worth it? Skullcandy Crusher ANC 2 HeadphonesSee Full Review

Product Description

Crusher ANC 2 + Extra USB-C Charging Cable. Welcome to your all-access pass to immersive sound. Crusher ANC 2 levels up your listening with adjustable sensory bass and customizable noise cancellation that adapts to your world, or blocks it out completely. Whether you’re front row at a sold-out show (in your head) or zoning in with zero distractions, you’re in control. Personalized sound? You got it. With the Skull-iQ app, dial in your unique hearing profile, tweak the EQ, and even assign custom button functions. It’s your sound, your way.

What's in the box

  • Crusher® ANC 2 Wireless Headphones
  • Cable
  • USB-C Charging Cable
  • Protective Case

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
    Sponsored

    Customers say

    Customers find these headphones superior in quality, with crystal clear mids and highs, and appreciate their ability to control bass levels. They are comfortable, with customers noting they don't hurt their ears and feel great, while the noise cancellation effectively blocks out 80% of surrounding volume. The battery life is impressive, and customers consider them well worth the price. They are durable, with one customer mentioning they last all day even with ANC enabled.

    Amazon Customer
    5 out of 5 stars
    Best Headphones Ever with Crazy Long Battery Life!
    These headphones are insanely comfortable, literally the best I’ve ever used. I’m mind-blown by how long the battery lasts. I’ve been at 40% for over a week. I listen on and off for an hour here and there and it hasn’t moved. Unreal. If you want comfort, insane battery life, and top-notch sound, these are it!

    • Evile
      5.0 out of 5 stars Bass Lovers Only
      Reviewed in the United States on February 24, 2026
      Color: Preppy BlueSize: One SizeStyle: BundleVerified Purchase
      OMG these are amazing! the sound quality is next level and the bass is like no other - your head literally shakes! they fit really well because they have many points of articulation. set up was easy using the app. the battery lasts forever. the feel and look are of high quality and are very durable.

    • Lee T
      5.0 out of 5 stars These Headphones Will Satisfy Your Bass Addiction
      Reviewed in the United States on July 13, 2025
      Color: BoneSize: One SizeStyle: BundleVerified Purchase
      I instantly paired them with Bluetooth, pressed play on Van Halen, and I was back in 1984 at the Mid-South Coliseum! These are the best headphones I've ever heard. They're not painfully loud, but they pump out thumping bass and vibrate my head. Enough bass to feel like I'm getting buck wild up in the club. You can FEEL the kick drum! And they are clear enough to hear the original recording noise on studio recordings. Rolling up the bass wheel gives the impression of higher volume music without loud high frequencies damaging your eardrums. If you have a pathological passion for music, you'll love these headphones.

      I also noticed a switch toggles between 3 listening modes: ANC Off, ANC On, Stay-Aware. I was in my yard and the noise cancellation (ANC) totally silenced a garbage truck dumping my trash. When I turned on Stay-Aware (transparency mode), microphones in the headset apparently amplified the outside noise so I could hear the garbage truck and other ambient sounds perfectly. This mode is great if you're wearing them in a place where safety is important, so you can hear outside noises.

      I chose the bone color so the sun won't heat them up when I'm wearing them outside. They came with a nice bag, but the headphones are standard size and fit into a non-branded headphone case I purchased for some other wireless cans. The Bluetooth works well and paired instantly with my phone and laptop. The ear pads and head pad are soft and comfortable, so the phones feel like part of my head when I wear them. Hanging these phones on a hook might damage these soft pads, so I intend to store them in a case, but they appear to be durable enough for careful users. If you abuse your stuff, these soft pads might not last long.

      These Crusher ANC2 headphones are expensive so I got the Prime Day deal for $124, but I think these headphones are worth the full price if you love music and you've purchased as many low-quality headphones as I have. I wish I had bought two pairs now, so I could give one pair as a gift. Music just sounds better with powerful, high-quality headphones.
      Read more
      Lee T
      5.0 out of 5 stars
      These Headphones Will Satisfy Your Bass Addiction

      Reviewed in the United States on July 13, 2025
      I instantly paired them with Bluetooth, pressed play on Van Halen, and I was back in 1984 at the Mid-South Coliseum! These are the best headphones I've ever heard. They're not painfully loud, but they pump out thumping bass and vibrate my head. Enough bass to feel like I'm getting buck wild up in the club. You can FEEL the kick drum! And they are clear enough to hear the original recording noise on studio recordings. Rolling up the bass wheel gives the impression of higher volume music without loud high frequencies damaging your eardrums. If you have a pathological passion for music, you'll love these headphones.

      I also noticed a switch toggles between 3 listening modes: ANC Off, ANC On, Stay-Aware. I was in my yard and the noise cancellation (ANC) totally silenced a garbage truck dumping my trash. When I turned on Stay-Aware (transparency mode), microphones in the headset apparently amplified the outside noise so I could hear the garbage truck and other ambient sounds perfectly. This mode is great if you're wearing them in a place where safety is important, so you can hear outside noises.

      I chose the bone color so the sun won't heat them up when I'm wearing them outside. They came with a nice bag, but the headphones are standard size and fit into a non-branded headphone case I purchased for some other wireless cans. The Bluetooth works well and paired instantly with my phone and laptop. The ear pads and head pad are soft and comfortable, so the phones feel like part of my head when I wear them. Hanging these phones on a hook might damage these soft pads, so I intend to store them in a case, but they appear to be durable enough for careful users. If you abuse your stuff, these soft pads might not last long.

      These Crusher ANC2 headphones are expensive so I got the Prime Day deal for $124, but I think these headphones are worth the full price if you love music and you've purchased as many low-quality headphones as I have. I wish I had bought two pairs now, so I could give one pair as a gift. Music just sounds better with powerful, high-quality headphones.

    • NinjaNutjob
      5.0 out of 5 stars From Airport budget brand to AAA Consumer Quality
      Reviewed in the United States on September 8, 2024
      Color: True BlackSize: One SizeStyle: BundleVerified Purchase
      I was searching around for a decent Bluetooth Music/Gaming headset. Mostly for music while i travel. I have some Sony C700 Ear Buds, they are great but I dont want to risk losing them on travel. Almost happened a few times. I was going to opt for the Sony WH-1000XM4. I know they are really good, but didnt want to drop $350 on them and I dont need the mic input. These Skullcandy Crusher ANC 2 happened to go on sale twice, luckily the 2nd time on a payday for once!!! YAY!!! Got them for around $120 instead of the $230. I have been skeptic about Skullcandy products for a long time because I kept seeing them only as the budget brand at Airports and some local stores. To my surprise they came out of that niche area and made a big name for themselves.

      I was a little worried as some reported the case was missing and the headset seemed used. I made sure to verify before making the purchase that it was straight from Amazon. When they arrived I was happy everyone was sealed and CIB.

      The headset fits comfortably and I often forget that im wearing them. Its been about 3 days since ive had them. The pictures make them seem a bit larger than they actually are in person. I have medium sized ears and these fit perfectly over them. This current session at the time of writing this, ive had these on for about 10 hours straight, jumping around between listing to music, watching a show and playing video games. My ears and my head do not hurt from long term use like most headsets tend to do. The padding is very comfortable.

      Audio quality is a lot better than I ever expected it to be. For Bluetooth, you usually have an above average quality compared to most RF receiver headsets. Im simply blown away with how clear, strong and deep the audio comes through.

      Crusher - Deep Bass feature. You want Deep Bass ACTION in your audio. This is the headset for you. The Crusher control is beyond insanity, its like having twice or 3 times the bass of Dolby Atmos in a movie theatre but wrapped around your ears. Crank it just 1/3 of the way, youll literally feel the ear cups vibrating from the bass, and its not even uncomfortable. At 1/2 way its practically an ear massager if youre watching an action movie or playing an action video game. Though at 100% Crusher, I think its a bit much as it drowns out the rest of the audio, but it may be good for something I have yet to listen to.

      ANC 2 - (Audio Noise Cancelling) kills about 90% of the ambient sound around you. You can barely hear your own inner vocals as you talk, thats how good it is.

      Battery - It came in charged at 50%. Didnt take long to charge to 100%. So using this from a full charge for 10 hours straight, ive consumed 20% battery life. So this is very accurate to the 50 Hour Capacity from a full charge.

      Skull-IQ App - Just like any other bluetooth companion app, it does what it needs to do. Allows for adjusting settings and updating the firmware.

      Bluetooth - I had issues off the bat at first when connecting to my Laptop. Nothing was found to identify the Connecting, disconnected, connected, disconnected, repeating issue. What I found was that this headset doesnt like any other Audio accessories that also use Bluetooth. So they both fight for who is in charge. I had my Turtlebeach 6000 Gen 2 receiver in my USB so they were fighting each other. Removed the receiver and resynced the SC Crushers to the bluetooth. Once i figured that out, no issues from that. However my one annoyance that I never encountered with any other Bluetooth headset is that this headset will cut all audio from the source thats primarily active (i.e. the game on my laptop) and play the notification or audio from my phone only. Once thats done, there is like 3-4 seconds of dead air before it swaps back to my games audio. Ive not experienced that with my Sony C700's. It just quiets the audio on one source temporarily.

      Overall these will be great for (still good for other categories but might hinder the experiences for something like Country Music wouldnt go well with this headset) -

      Music - Dance, Hip-Hop, R&B, RAP, Rock, Metal, POP.
      Movies - Action, Ambient / Atmospheric, Horror
      Gaming - Action, Ambient / Atmospheric, Horror, Music based, Fighting.

      I highly recommend the Skullcandy Crusher ANC 2.
      9.2/10
      Read more

      Translate review to English
    • Richard A.
      5.0 out of 5 stars Qualität. Erlebnisswerter Bass.
      Reviewed in Germany on December 2, 2025
      Color: True BlackSize: One SizeStyle: BundleVerified Purchase
      Ich schreibe keine Rezensionen außer ich habe das Ding lange genutzt. Hier: täglich seit Juni 2025 (was ich tatsächlich nur von meinem Handy behaupten kann, und jetzt von den Crusher)

      Oh Boy oh Boy. Die Crusher massieren die Trommelfelle wie keine Anderen. Und wie.

      Ich bin derart von diesem amerikanischen Hersteller begeistert (was ich nicht beim Kauf wusste, und möglicherweise meinen Kauf beeinflusst hätte in heutigen Zeiten) dass ich meinen Punkteabzug wegen der nicht soooooooo 100% wirksamen Rauschunterdrückung aufhebe (Fahrtwind schafft er nicht, da schalte ich die Rauschunterdrückung eher aus...) und dennoch mit 5 Sternen bewertet. Dieser voll einstellbarer Bass ist einfach eine Wohltat, und zaubert mir täglich (meistens völlig unverhofft) Lächeln ins Gesicht...

      Ich räume ein dass viel Bass nicht Jedermanns Sache ist, aber hier ist jedem überlassen wie intensiv er ihn aufdrehen will. Stufenlos...

      Und der Akku erst. Ein Traum. Schnellaufladung wenn man es verpennt haben sollte und den ganzen Tag auf den Ohren, saubere Kombi. Auch der Tragekomfort ermöglicht die lange Nutzung. Frau und Sohn finden auch dass trotz schmälerer Köpfe der Bügel vom Druck ausreicht dass sie nicht fallen.

      Letzter Punkt von mir: die Steuerung über Sprache ist nach meiner Bewertung ebenfalls zweckmäßig und funktioniert gut bis sehr gut. Selbst bei 20-30km/h Wind- und Fahrgeräusche (e-skate und e-scooter) lassen sich die Crusher befehlen. Herunterladen der App und Kopplung des Crushers mit dem Handy, alles einfach und ohne Herausforderungen.
      Read more
      Report

    • Marcel LeBlanc
      5.0 out of 5 stars The most Bass you will feel with with your brain while having no distortion
      Reviewed in Canada on June 23, 2025
      Color: True BlackSize: One SizeStyle: BundleVerified Purchase
      Best Bass and sound you will ever get on a pair of headphones.
      Bluetooth and wired connections incorporated.
      Long lasting rechargeable battery.
      Can pair to multiple items simultaneously: Listen to YT or music and have it pause automatically when your phone rings so you can answer clearly thru the headset.
      Noise Cancelling on/off + Stay Aware on: it lets you listen to what is happening around you thru the microphone while continuing to operate whatever you were listening to.
      Voice control activation of settings.
      Skull IQ app to set-up the settings to your liking: EQ, button functions, Personal sound, Hearing modes, etc...
      If you are the type of person that likes the windows to shake in your car or home , the Crusher settings can literally make you feel you are rattling your brain!
      These are the best comfortable headphones you can get, with nice cushioned pads and great controls.
      I completely recommend these headphones!!!
      Read more
      Report
    • Christian
      5.0 out of 5 stars Bassi supremi e esperienza unica in alcuni ambiti
      Reviewed in Italy on May 28, 2025
      Color: True BlackSize: One SizeStyle: BundleVerified Purchase
      Faccio questa recensione dopo poco più di 6 mesi di utilizzo e devo dire che mi trovo benissimo, ho provato le cuffie in diverse situazioni: 1) per la musica sono eccezionali per alcuni generi, ovviamente parliamo di brani con bassi preponderanti è qua che danno il meglio, il sistema detto crush è pazzesco, puoi regolarlo con una semplice rotella e sembra di avere un sub nelle orecchie e di quelli potenti, per generi più "melodici" per così dire, si perde forse qualcosa agli alti e medi, però assicuro che anche per musica rock sono eccezionali, basso e batteria si sento come mai prima d'ora. 2) provate con film collegate dirette alla tv con il Bluetooth e anche qua è nuovamente una esperienza difficile da paragonare, per film d'azione in cui ci sono spari, esplosioni, motori di auto e moto, sembra di essere letteralmente al cinema con quei bassi che ti entrano dentro il petto, fanno letteralmente vibrare tutta la testa in certe situazioni. 3) videogame sempre collegate diretta alla tv, come per i film vale lo stesso discorso, titoli più action né guadagnano, giocare ad un cod piuttosto che un assassin's creed, cambia totalmente l'esperienza, tutto diventa più immersivo e pieno, purtroppo per dovere di cronaca, non si possono collegare dirette alla ps5 e utilizzare quindi l'audio 3d (peccato) ma su pc vanno bensimmo.
      La batteria è praticamente infinita, non ho mai verificato se siano veramente 50/60 ore come dicono, ma penso proprio che ci si avvici molto. La cancellazione del rumore è totale, sia per il fatto che avvolgono benissimo le orecchie e sia per la cancellazione attiva dei rumori, non si sente assolutamente nulla dei rumori esterni. Le chiamate sono buone si sente bene, nulla di superlativo, ma va bene così non sono fatte per quello. Buono il fatto di poterle collegare a 2 dispositivi contemporaneamente. L'unico contro riscontrato è il non poter scegliere l'assistente vocale, c'è solo il suo ed è in lingua inglese, peccato ma non indispensabile. Anche la costruzione è buona, di qualità le ho trovate leggere per la topologia di cuffie e anche i cuscinetti non scaldano troppo e non premono, sono molto comode. In buona sostanza ho dato 5 stelle perché per l'utilizzo che ne faccio sono TOP.
      Read more
      Report
      Translate review to English
    See more reviews

    Product Summary: Skullcandy Crusher ANC 2 Wireless Over-Ear Bluetooth Headphones with Extra USB-C Charging Cable, Multi-Sensory Bass, Active Noise Cancelling, 60 Hours Battery, Microphone iPhone Android - True Black

    From Skullcandy

    4.6 out of 5 stars, 3,101 ratings

    Customer reviews

    300+ bought in past month

    Price

    One-time purchase: $239.99

    Purchasing options

    Other sellers

    Other sellers

    About this Item

    • PATENTED MULTI-SENSORY CRUSHER BASS TECHNOLOGY. Featuring two full-range 40mm audio drivers plus additional dual bass drivers, your music and movies will come alive with a sound experience you can actually feel
    • ADJUSTABLE 4-MIC ACTIVE NOISE CANCELLING. Designed with adjustable 4-mic active noise canceling that allows you to hush the chaos around you
    • UP TO 60 HOURS BATTERY + RAPID CHARGE. Get hours of uninterrupted listening with up to 60 hours of battery life with ANC off. With Rapid Charge, just 10 minutes of charging gives you 4 hours of listening
    • PERSONALIZED SOUND IN THE SKULL-IQ APP. Customize your sound with Personal Sound by Mimi, adjustable hearing modes: Active Noise Canceling, Stay-Aware, and fine-tune your EQ
    • MULTIPOINT PAIRING. Connect to two devices at once with seamless transitions
    • BUNDLE INCLUDES EXTRA USB-C TO USB-C CHARGING CABLE. The headphones come with an additional 1.6 ft 15-watt high speed charging cable, so that you can power up on the go
    • BUY WITH CONFIDENCE. Skullcandy 1-Year USA Limited Warranty included

    Product Description

    Crusher ANC 2 + Extra USB-C Charging Cable. Welcome to your all-access pass to immersive sound. Crusher ANC 2 levels up your listening with adjustable sensory bass and customizable noise cancellation that adapts to your world, or blocks it out completely. Whether you’re front row at a sold-out show (in your head) or zoning in with zero distractions, you’re in control. Personalized sound? You got it. With the Skull-iQ app, dial in your unique hearing profile, tweak the EQ, and even assign custom button functions. It’s your sound, your way.
